name: Risecomm Group Holdings Limited
summary: Risecomm Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs and develops application-specific integrated circuits (ICs) in the People's Republic of China. It operates through two segments, Automated Meter Reading (AMR) and Other Business; and Smart Manufacturing & Industrial Automation System (SMIA) Business. The AMR Business segment designs, develops, and sells power-line communication ICs, modules, and devices; energy saving; and environmental protection products that are used in streetlight control, and building energy and photovoltaic power management. This segment also provides maintenance services in connection with the deployment and upgrading of AMR systems by power grid companies. The SMIA Business segment sells software license and production safety products, as well as provides software post-contract customer support services, including smart manufacturing and industrial automation system. Risecomm Group Holdings Limited was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
